reviews.comment:
Cargan nafta, que más podes opinar. A veces te atienden bien otras no tanto. Quien me revisó el aire de las cubiertas, hará 2 semanas, se "olvidó" de poner las tapas de las válvulas del lado que yo no veía.

(Translated by Google)
They fill up with gas, what more can you say? Sometimes the service is good, sometimes not so much. The person who checked my tire pressure about two weeks ago "forgot" to put the valve caps on the side I couldn't see.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2OTUzNU1nEAE
